title: Celeste Create Hell: REFORGED
description: There is no such thing as infinite resources! Now with copper!!!
body:
# Celeste Create Hell [v7]
{reforged under development}
### Have you been tired of playing minecraft for any of these reasons? 
- finishing the Create mod in a single afternoon
- getting to full netherite on day 1 of your friends SMP
- don't wanna play RL CRAFT, but still want a challenge
- no reason to explore the basic vanilla world

Well the **_Celeste Create Hell_** modpack is for you!!!

**Celeste Create Hell** is a modpack designed to limit the power that Create has on the world, so that each accomplishment feels more _satisfying_ the further down you go down the tech! 

~~### Origins:
We have added things such as the **origins mod** so that you can play the game the best way _you wanna_. ~~

 
### Limited Create Energy
~~And with Fluid bocks now being finite,~~ you must **stratigized** the best way to get your energy! _No more infinite cobble and machines that run 24/7 becoming bascially bitcoin miners_ >> Im talking about you CreateLover1592!!! stop lagging up the server with your infinite iron generator!!!

### Limited Resources
We want to focus on the player and how they take care of there surroundings around them! And with these mods you can find a place to truely call home! and perhaps even enjoy a relaxing day playing Create the way it was intended, with patience, and building up your world to be more lively with locomotives and factories. 


### Slower Progression!!!
With the Serene Tempature mod being by default set so that seasons take **1 month IRL**, you really need to play the modpack in the season you pick. With the tempature mod also being more harsh where you have became cold blooded so now your temp changes quickly!!! 


### Qaulity of Life
There are many other mods that make the game more fun with playing with friends!
- Chunk protection with Minimap Support :o
- Media Players for creating the most chillax inn!
- Colorful blocks to express yourself how ever <3
~~- No Ocean to encourage out the box thinking for Create steam power!
~~- Confetti Creepers... its hard enough already!

With all this fun it will be easy to forget what its all about... bringing back the fun in modded minecraft! but lets not over do it this time ;)

# DO YOU AND YOUR FRIENDS HAVE WHAT IT TAKES?
### join the discord for help!

SPECIAL SHOUT OUTS:
- Eyezah for there hard work on Cosmetica 2.0 and creating support for new cosmetic possibilities | SUPPORT THEM IF YOU CAN
- Trabens for there hard work on updating Flowing Fluids for fabric to be compatible with Fabric Create, and fixing the recipes for create, and AN AMAZING OPTIMIZATION UPDATE!!! | SUPPORT THEM IF YOU CAN

_Celeste Create Hell - 2026_
